The total crypto market capitalization has now fallen to $3. 53 trillion, down over 6% in a single day, as investor […] The post Altcoins Plunge as $1.

data.title: Bloomberg: Binance and other crypto companies are under anti-money laundering investigation by the French government
data.description: According to Bloomberg, France is expanding its anti-money laundering scrutiny of cryptocurrency trading platforms, with regulators attempting to determine which of the over 100 institutions registered to provide crypto services in the country will receive EU-wide operating licenses in the coming months. According to people familiar with the matter, the French Prudential Supervision and Resolution Authority (ACPR) has been reviewing dozens of trading platforms since the end of last year. These people requested anonymity due to the confidentiality of the process. Binance and other platforms are under scrutiny by ACPR officials, according to these people. As part of these reviews, the regulator last year asked Binance, the operator of the world's largest cryptocurrency exchange, to strengthen its risk controls, according to one person familiar with the matter.

data.title: ANZ: Geopolitical, economic and fiscal uncertainties leave gold with room to rise
data.description: ANZ analysts wrote that gold prices hit new highs as investors bet the Federal Reserve will continue to cut interest rates. Growing trade tensions are increasing gold's safe-haven demand. Amid geopolitical, economic, and fiscal uncertainty, gold still has room to rise. ANZ analysts predict that gold prices will peak at $4,600 per ounce by mid-2026. (Gold Ten)

data.title: Japanese Banks to Launch Stablecoins for Commercial Use
data.description: According to BlockBeats, major Japanese banks are set to issue stablecoins for commercial purposes. This move is aimed at enhancing the efficiency and security of financial transactions within the country. The introduction of stablecoins by these banks marks a significant step in integrating digital currencies into mainstream financial systems. The initiative is expected to facilitate smoother and more reliable transactions, benefiting both businesses and consumers in Japan.

data.title: MGBX will launch CLO (Yei Finance), 4 (4) spot trading
data.description: According to official news, MGBX will launch CLO (Yei Finance) and 4 (4) spot trading at 18:00 (SGT) on October 17, 2025. Deposits will open at 17:00 (SGT) on October 17, 2025. Trading will open at 18:00 (SGT) on October 17, 2025. Withdrawals will open at 19:00 (SGT) on October 20, 2025.

data.title: BitMart LaunchPrime: Second Phase Project Meteora (MET) Launched
data.description: According to official news, BitMart has officially launched the second phase of its LaunchPrime project, Meteora (MET). This limited-time subscription event features a total supply of 36,000 MET, with a maximum deposit of 500 USDT per user. Users can participate in the subscription after completing registration. The event will consist of three phases: registration, deposit, and distribution. Tokens will ultimately be distributed based on individual deposits. As part of BitMart's strategic upgrade, LaunchPrime provides users with a high-quality channel for early-stage asset investment, further enriching the platform's ecosystem. With the addition of more high-quality projects, BitMart is committed to creating more investment opportunities for users and promoting the development of the crypto market.

data.title: Institutional Investor '7 Siblings' Acquires Additional Ethereum Amid Price Drop
data.description: According to PANews, the institutional investor known as '7 Siblings' has recently purchased 2,665 Ethereum (ETH) following a price drop of over 7%. The transaction was completed at approximately $3,752 per ETH, totaling around $10 million. This follows their previous acquisition on October 11, where they bought ETH after a similar price decline. In total, '7 Siblings' has invested 23 million USDC to acquire 6,149.6 ETH at an average price of about $3,740.

data.title: A whale's ETH and BTC long positions lost over $10 million
data.description: According to Lookonchain, the whale (0xc2a3) has lost over $10 million in ETH and BTC long positions, wiping out $5.5 million in profits and leaving a net loss of $4 million. The whale is still increasing its BTC long position. Its current holdings include: 1,260 BTC, valued at $132.5 million; 19,894 ETH, valued at $74.44 million.

data.title: The first phase of the Gate Contract Points airdrop has begun. Receive DogeCoin (DOGE) for a limited time.
data.description: According to an official announcement, Gate will launch the first phase of its contract points airdrop event at 7:00 PM (UTC+8) on October 17th, using DogeCoin (DOGE) as the airdrop token. This event features a high- and low-tiered system. Eligibility requirements include holding 12 or more Gate contract points. For every 10 Gate contract points spent, you can receive 152 DOGE. A limited number of DOGE will be available on a first-come, first-served basis. The airdrop can be redeemed from 7:00 PM to 11:59 PM (UTC+8) on October 17th, with rewards distributed to your spot account or unified account approximately one hour after successful redemption. Gate contract points are generated based on users' contract trading data on the platform, representing the cumulative daily points accumulated over the past 15 days. Points determine eligibility for token airdrops, TGE subscriptions, and limited-time events. Higher points also grant more exclusive benefits. To participate, you must update the app to version 7.24 or higher. The web version will also be available.

data.title: DeFi Development Buys $16M SOL at $111, But Stock Value Per Share Drops 25%
data.description:
DeFi Development purchased 86,307 SOL for approximately $16 million at $110. 91 increasing its treasury to 2,195,926 SOL worth $426 million, yet the company's SOL per share metric dropped 25% to $14. 67 from $19. 44 as warrant dilution outpaced treasury growth.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/defi-development-buys-16m-sol-at-111-but-stock-value-per-share-drops-25/

data.title: Typus Finance: Bug fixes completed, no liquidation risk during perpetual contract suspension
data.description: According to an announcement from Typus Finance, the team has completed an internal code fix for the vulnerability disclosed the previous day and is currently awaiting review by independent security experts before redeployment. Typus emphasized that during the suspension, all perpetual swap positions will not be liquidated, and user collateral is safe and recoverable after security checks are completed. Officials also stated that fund tracing efforts are being coordinated with partners and law enforcement agencies, and an asset recovery plan is still being developed internally. The team reiterated its commitment to continued transparency and to promptly update users on key developments.

data.title: USDC Treasury Burns 65 Million Tokens on Ethereum Blockchain
data.description: According to PANews, Whale Alert has reported that the USDC Treasury recently destroyed 65 million USDC tokens on the Ethereum blockchain. This significant action reflects ongoing adjustments within the cryptocurrency market. The burning of tokens is a common practice used to manage supply and demand dynamics, potentially impacting the value of the remaining tokens. The move comes amid broader discussions about the stability and regulation of digital currencies. As the market continues to evolve, such activities are closely monitored by industry observers and stakeholders.

data.title: Strategy Bitcoin holdings market value fell below $70 billion, evaporating over $10 billion in the past two weeks
data.description: Saylortracker data shows that crypto market volatility has caused the market value of Strategy (MicroStrategy)'s Bitcoin holdings to evaporate by over $10 billion over the past two weeks, from a high of over $80 billion on October 7th to a current $68.37 billion. However, Strategy's Bitcoin holdings still have a net profit of nearly $21 billion, a year-to-date return of 44.30%. Strategy currently holds 640,250 Bitcoins, with an average purchase price of approximately $74,000.

data.title: Blockchain Address Increases Bitcoin and Ethereum Holdings Despite Losses
data.description: According to PANews, a blockchain address identified as 0xc2a3 has increased its long positions in Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH). The current holdings amount to approximately 1,260 BTC, valued at around $132.5 million, and 19,894 ETH, worth about $744.4 million. Previously, the address had realized profits of approximately $5.5 million, which have now been reversed, resulting in a net loss of about $4.69 million. The unrealized losses exceed $10 million. Despite these setbacks, the address continues to increase its BTC long positions.

data.title: In the past 24 hours, the entire network has liquidated $959 million, mainly due to long orders
data.description: Coinglass data shows that in the past 24 hours, the entire network has experienced a liquidation of US$959 million, of which long positions have been liquidated for US$747 million and short positions have been liquidated for US$212 million.
